response.step_by_step_log: 1. Monitored the entire video for vocal musical performances. 2. Identified only Minecraft instrumental background music and player commentary in Japanese. 3. Concluded that there are no vocal musical segments to process, so all song-related fields are set to null.
response.global_summary: A gameplay video in a Minecraft server where the player mines, manages their bank account, shops at a market, and updates job skills to prepare for a dungeon challenge.

scenes.description: Player mines blocks, crafts items, and walks around the base area.
Player visits the ATM to deposit money.
Player explores the market area and interacts with various shops.
Player enters the skill building and updates their job level to Fighter, preparing for a dungeon challenge.
